series_metadata.series_title: Statewide Cost Allocation Plan (SWCAP) Report and Support Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Contains SWCAP (Statewide Cost Allocation Plan) worksheets and analysis of rate schedules including final cost plan, OAKS division data, reports, schedules, division communications, federal audit review, and other related records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: and federal audit review and approval ; Electronic: and federal audit review and approval
